subcodes.first_line: O luminous and radiant one! White is among the names of the sun; thus thy rays and effulgence must needs endure hardship [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بیضاء نوراء بیضاء اسمی از اسماء شمس است لهذا شعاع و اشراق شما تحمل مشقت
subcodes.subjects: @importance of community building, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @Manifestation of God as sun, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @love of God
